connection_params.name: rabbitmq_url
connection_params.description: RabbitMQ AMQP URL (e.g. amqp://guest:guest@localhost:5672). Hosts 33 entity fanout exchanges.

connection_params.name: erpi_rest_url
connection_params.description: ERPI REST API base URL (e.g. http://localhost:3000/api). Used for backfill and health checks.

connection_params.name: erpi_graphql_url
connection_params.description: ERPI GraphQL endpoint for enrichment queries. Optional — used when RabbitMQ messages lack full entity context.

connection_params.name: jwt_token
connection_params.description: JWT bearer token for authenticated REST/GraphQL requests.

connection_params.name: rabbitmq_consumer_group
connection_params.description: Consumer group for queue naming. Must be unique to Forge.
